---
title: "Publications"
listing:
  - id: papers
    template: ../_ejs/publications.ejs
    contents: papers/**/index.qmd
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    page-size: 30
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [image, pub_number, title, publication, author, url_source, doi, pdf, code]
  - id: posters
    template: ../_ejs/publications.ejs
    contents: posters/**/index.qmd
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    page-size: 30
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [image, pub_number, title, publication, author, venue, pdf, poster_pdf, article_pdf]
  - id: presentations
    template: ../_ejs/publications.ejs
    contents: presentations/**/index.qmd
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    page-size: 30
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [image, pub_number, title, publication, author, venue, pdf, video]
  - id: related
    template: ../_ejs/publications.ejs
    contents: related/**/index.qmd
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    page-size: 30
    filter-ui: false
    fields: [image, pub_number, title, publication, author, journ, doi, pdf]
page-layout: full
---

## Journal and conference papers

:::{#papers}
:::

## Posters

:::{#posters}
:::

## Presentations

:::{#presentations}
:::

## Related works

:::{#related}
:::
